creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
nobutaka    2007-07-15 15:28:35 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    multimedia/xine      Makefile distinfo pkg-plist 
    multimedia/xine/files patch-src:xitk:kbindings.c 
                          patch-src:xitk:skins.c 
                          patch-src:xitk:skins:xinetic:skinconfig 
                          patch-src:xitk:tvset.c

                          patch-src_fb_Makefile.in 
                          patch-src_xitk_Makefile.in 
                          patch-src_xitk_stream_infos.c

                          patch-src:xitk:Makefile.in

                          patch-src:xitk:network.c 
                          patch-src:xitk:oxine:mediamarks.c

                          patch-src_xitk_main.c 
  Log:
  Update to 0.99.5.
  Use OPTIONS.
  Add lirc support (default off).
  Make curl support optional (default on).
  Add WITHOUT_NLS knob
  
  PR:             ports/114015
  Submitted by:   Max Brazhnikov <makc@issp.ac.ru>
